pi_items.source: Task instructions, setup_task.sh, and verifier.py logic explicitly requiring audio mutes, segment excision, and structured JSON logs.
Task semantics, script contents (FFmpeg redaction tasks), and metadata consistency checks.
Cross-referenced with O*NET/BLS standard occupational classification for Information and Record Clerks, All Other.
Task description and generated document redaction_schedule.txt citing State Code and FOIA Exemption 7(C)/7(D) for a bodycam footage FOIA request.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies entirely on synthetically generated body camera footage created via FFmpeg in the setup script. The FOIA redaction scenario uses a fictitious case ID 'FOIA-2024-0847' and references standard law enforcement FOIA exemptions (like 7(C) and 7(D)). The task specifically tests skills in audio muting, video segment excision, and compliance documentation, which aligns with the stated occupation of a Records Management Specialist (SOC 43-4199) operating in Local Government/Law Enforcement.
